description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a sprawling layout, surrounded by a fenced yard and featuring a large driveway leading to a covered carport. The house has a low-pitched, multi-faceted hip roof with brown shingles and beige exterior walls, giving it a modern ranch appearance. The property is enclosed by a combination of solid and slatted fencing, providing both privacy and visibility. The front area includes a paved walkway and driveway, while the rear and side yards are covered with grass. Windows are modestly sized and asymmetrically placed, with the main entryway sheltered by a roof overhang. The overall design emphasizes horizontal lines and open outdoor space, typical of contemporary suburban homes.
description: A single-story modern ranch-style house with a hip roof, fenced yard, and large driveway leading to a covered carport. The exterior features beige walls, brown roofing, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, covered carport, driveway, and fenced yard.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the driveway, carport, and side yard with visible fencing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, extensive fencing, and grassy yard.
description_view_3: Side/rear angle showing the carport entrance, roof structure, and yard layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, sheltered by a roof overhang and adjacent to a covered carport, with a paved approach and minimal decorative elements.
